arts.ttl: Stoke City sack head coach Steven Schumacher, cite 'change in direction'
arts.sum: Championship club Stoke City make the surprise decision to part ways with head coach Steven Schumacher.

arts.ttl: Next Stoke City manager odds with shock return twist after Steven Schumacher exit
arts.sum: Running closely behind Challinor are former Sunderland and Birmingham City boss Tony Mowbray (4/1), former Southampton and Reading manager Ruben Selles (5/1), and interestingly Ryan Lowe (6/1), who was the first managerial casualty in the Championship this season when he left Preston North End after a single game. Their choice could yet be an entirely surprise one, however BonusCodeBets ' immediate publication of betting odds for the next permanent Potters boss suggest there already several high-profile names in the running.

arts.ttl: Stoke City next manager live as top target quickly emerges to replace Steven Schumacher
arts.sum: But sporting director Jon Walters and chairman John Coates have made the decision for a major change in direction just a month into the new season and a fortnight after the end of the summer transfer window. Chairman Coates added: “Steven, Mark, Chris, Peter and Elliot depart with our thanks for their efforts and with our best wishes for their future careers.

arts.ttl: Stoke City receive Steven Schumacher exit response as next manager discussed
arts.sum: Stoke City have confirmed Steven Schumacher has left his position as head coach, bringing an end to an almost 10-month tenure at the club. They do so with a win percentage of 41 percent, with sporting director Jon Walters explaining his role is 'to make tough decisions that serve the long-term interests of Stoke City '.

arts.ttl: Steven Schumacher's final words as Stoke City boss after Oxford United defeat
arts.sum: Steven Schumacher's time as Stoke City manager has come to and end after the club announced his departure this morning after the weekend's defeat to Oxford United. Stoke never got going in their first match back after the international break and ended up falling 1-0 at the Kassam Stadium, with Schumacher admitting his side got what they deserved.
Stoke City sacked head coach Steven Schumacher following Saturday's defeat by Oxford United.
